run_metadata.repository: Ai Orchestrator - Post Paradigm Shift Implementation

context_analysis.context_capacity: Exceeds single context window - requires exploration strategy

run_scope.focus: New paradigm shift modules (TDD, Diff, Cross-Project Learning, Benchmark, Design-to-Code, Plugins, Deploy Loop, SaaS Tenancy)
run_scope.rationale: Fresh code has highest bug probability. 3,896 lines of new production code added with 35 tests. Need to verify security and reliability before production deployment.

risk_tolerance.justification: Multi-tenant SaaS with API key authentication, auto-deployment capabilities, and cross-project data sharing. Security vulnerabilities could affect all tenants.
